seed_instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend.
org_constraint: Include the keyword "confirmation" in the email.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "confirmation" in the email.
instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. Include the keyword "confirmation" in the email. Avoid using the keyword "confirmation" in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Room Availability for Next Weekend

Dear Hotel Management Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to inquire about room availability for next weekend, specifically from Friday, October 26th, to Sunday, October 28th. We are planning a short getaway and would appreciate it if you could let us know which room categories are currently open.

Additionally, could you please provide details regarding any special offers or packages available for this period?

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
